buildCommand: cd ../.. && bun scripts/generate-routes.ts && bun scripts/generate-convex.ts && bun run --filter @repo/web build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.convex.cloud wss://*.convex.cloud https://*.clerk.accounts.dev; frame-src 'self' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
